name: The Wellness Optimizer
description: Tracks sleep, supplements, and workouts. Treats her body like a system to optimize. Willing to pay premiums for evidence-backed products.

name: The Busy Parent
description: Dual-income household with kids. Time-poor, convenience-motivated. Buys in bulk, loves subscriptions, trusts brands that have been recommended by other parents.

name: The Gen Z Aesthete
description: Highly visual, identity-expressive buyer. Discovers through TikTok and Instagram. Cares about brand voice, packaging, and whether the brand stands for something.

name: The Pet Parent
description: Treats their pet as a family member. Reads ingredient labels on pet food. Will pay a premium for health and quality. Often owns multiple pets.

name: The Affluent Classic
description: Established career or retired, disposable income, values quality and longevity over trends. Shops less frequently but at higher AOVs. Loyal to brands she trusts.

name: The Sustainability Buyer
description: Makes purchase decisions based on environmental and ethical footprint. Researches supply chains. Will pay more for genuinely sustainable options and is skeptical of greenwashing.

name: The Convenience-First Millennial
description: Urban, mid-to-high income, values speed and frictionlessness. Default to what's easy. Heavy subscription user. Low brand loyalty if another option is just as convenient.

name: The Value-Conscious Shopper
description: Budget-aware but not low-end. Looks for deals, reads reviews, comparison shops. Responds well to bundles, first-order discounts, and clear value articulation.

name: The Fitness Enthusiast
description: Works out 4+ times a week, follows fitness creators, buys performance apparel and supplements. Brand-loyal to things that perform. Identity-adjacent purchasing.

name: The Gifter
description: Not a persistent persona so much as a mode: any shopper within 30 days of a gifting holiday or life event. Higher AOV, looking for 'impressive-looking' purchases. Very responsive to gift-wrap and gifting messaging.
